failure_modes.failure_mode: Destructive create_deal executes without HITL approval
failure_modes.detection: Approvals table has no pending approval while audit_log shows create_deal side effects; golden trace expecting pending_approval fails
failure_modes.mitigation: Add create_deal to HITL_TOOLS and enforce requires_approval
failure_modes.rollback: Disable create_deal tool or feature-flag write tools to require manual approval

failure_modes.failure_mode: Agent answers deal facts without grounding (hallucinates/stale data)
failure_modes.detection: LLM response contains deal stage/amount without preceding get_deal/search_deals tool call; golden trace grounding tests fail
failure_modes.mitigation: Enforce grounding policy in prompt and graph (must call get_deal before deal answers)
failure_modes.rollback: Force read-only mode: block deal-specific answers unless tool call succeeded

failure_modes.failure_mode: No tracing in production due to missing Langfuse config
failure_modes.detection: Langfuse dashboard has no traces; startup logs show missing LANGFUSE keys
failure_modes.mitigation: Configure LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY/SECRET and add startup health check
failure_modes.rollback: Enable local trace sink or OpenTelemetry exporter until Langfuse is configured

failure_modes.failure_mode: Actor impersonation via service-token requests
failure_modes.detection: Audit log shows actor_id not matching authenticated service token claims; adversarial test passes with fake actor_id
failure_modes.mitigation: Validate actor_id against auth claims; enforce tenant scoping
failure_modes.rollback: Disable service-token endpoints or restrict to internal service identity only

failure_modes.failure_mode: Agent is amnesic because long-term memory disabled
failure_modes.detection: Memory store empty; DISABLE_LONG_TERM_MEMORY=true; agent fails to recall prior info in evals
failure_modes.mitigation: Enable mem0/pgvector and verify retention settings
failure_modes.rollback: Use deal context loader as minimal persistent memory (DB-backed)

failure_modes.failure_mode: No deal-scoped memory; agent forgets deal-specific history
failure_modes.detection: Deal follow-up questions require re-specifying deal context; evals show missing recall
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement deal-scoped memory and DealContext loader
failure_modes.rollback: Force explicit get_deal + recent_notes tool calls per turn

failure_modes.failure_mode: Prompt lacks M&A intelligence; bad stage reasoning
failure_modes.detection: Agent suggests invalid transitions or omits M&A terms in scenario tests
failure_modes.mitigation: Rewrite system prompt with M&A taxonomy, allowed transitions, and examples
failure_modes.rollback: Add validation guardrails in transition tool; block invalid transitions

failure_modes.failure_mode: Tool call loop with no budget leads to runaway execution
failure_modes.detection: Repeated tool calls in logs; request exceeds timeout; high tool_call_count
failure_modes.mitigation: Add tool call budget per turn and per conversation; hard-stop with error
failure_modes.rollback: Throttle tool calls and enforce max tokens

failure_modes.failure_mode: Prompt changes are untraceable (no versioning)
failure_modes.detection: Cannot identify which prompt version produced a response in logs
failure_modes.mitigation: Add prompt version header and hash; log per request
failure_modes.rollback: Pin prompt to last known good version; block deployment without version

failure_modes.failure_mode: Evals are not gating deployments (CI missing)
failure_modes.detection: CI pipeline allows merge despite golden trace failures
failure_modes.mitigation: Add CI gate with golden_trace_runner and fail on regressions
failure_modes.rollback: Manual release freeze until evals pass

failure_modes.failure_mode: No correlation_id propagation (debugging impossible)
failure_modes.detection: Logs cannot be tied across UI -> agent -> backend; missing X-Correlation-ID
failure_modes.mitigation: Add middleware to ingest/propagate correlation_id and inject into tool calls
failure_modes.rollback: Use request_id as temporary correlation until full propagation

failure_modes.failure_mode: Non-idempotent write tools cause duplicate creates/notes
failure_modes.detection: Duplicate deals/notes with same payload in DB; retries correlate with duplicates
failure_modes.mitigation: Add idempotency_key for create_deal/add_note and backend enforcement
failure_modes.rollback: Disable retries for write tools; manual dedupe job

failure_modes.failure_mode: Tool output schema mismatch (plain strings on errors)
failure_modes.detection: Tool outputs are not JSON; LLM misparses errors and proceeds
failure_modes.mitigation: Standardize ToolResult schema with success/data/error
failure_modes.rollback: Force error outputs to be JSON-wrapped before passing to LLM

failure_modes.failure_mode: mem0 hard-depends on OpenAI even when local-vLLM required
failure_modes.detection: OpenAI API calls during local-only deployments; missing API key failures
failure_modes.mitigation: Make mem0 provider configurable and support local embeddings
failure_modes.rollback: Disable mem0 and rely on DB-backed DealContext

failure_modes.failure_mode: Tool exceptions crash the agent (no try/except)
failure_modes.detection: Unhandled exception stack traces from _tool_call; 500 responses
failure_modes.mitigation: Wrap tool calls with try/except; return ToolResult error
failure_modes.rollback: Feature-flag error-resilient mode to bypass tool calls

failure_modes.failure_mode: RAG results stale or unverifiable (no provenance/freshness)
failure_modes.detection: RAG responses lack source metadata or timestamps; user reports stale data
failure_modes.mitigation: Require provenance metadata and freshness checks on RAG results
failure_modes.rollback: Fallback to DB queries or require manual confirmation

failure_modes.failure_mode: No decision ledger for non-HITL actions
failure_modes.detection: Cannot reconstruct why a tool was called; audit_log lacks reasoning
failure_modes.mitigation: Add decision_ledger table logging tool decisions and outcomes
failure_modes.rollback: Increase verbose logging for tool selection reasoning

failure_modes.failure_mode: Prompt/tool list drift (hardcoded tool list)
failure_modes.detection: System prompt lists tools that differ from registry; tool errors in logs
failure_modes.mitigation: Generate tool list dynamically from registry; prompt template uses runtime tool names
failure_modes.rollback: Add CI check to diff prompt tool list against registry

failure_modes.failure_mode: No response logging (cannot audit output quality)
failure_modes.detection: No stored responses for post-incident review; logs only inputs
failure_modes.mitigation: Add response logging with redaction and retention policy
failure_modes.rollback: Enable temporary debug logging for selected sessions

failure_modes.failure_mode: Eval coverage too small (10 traces) misses regressions
failure_modes.detection: New defects appear despite passing evals; eval set <30 cases
failure_modes.mitigation: Expand golden traces and add adversarial suite
failure_modes.rollback: Manual QA hold on releases until suite expanded

failure_modes.failure_mode: Stage transition rules missing in prompt
failure_modes.detection: Agent suggests invalid transitions in scenario tests
failure_modes.mitigation: Add stage transition matrix to prompt and enforce in tools
failure_modes.rollback: Hard-block invalid transitions at tool level

failure_modes.failure_mode: Dev mocks use invalid stage names causing test drift
failure_modes.detection: Local tests show stage values not in enum; mismatch with prod
failure_modes.mitigation: Fix mock data to use valid stage enums
failure_modes.rollback: Disable mocks and require integration tests

failure_modes.failure_mode: No deal health scoring; agent cannot triage pipeline risk
failure_modes.detection: Agent responses lack health indicators; no health score computed
failure_modes.mitigation: Implement deal health scoring and expose in DealContext
failure_modes.rollback: Manual scoring in UI until agent scoring exists

failure_modes.failure_mode: No next-step recommendations; weak deal guidance
failure_modes.detection: Agent replies are generic; no stage-aware next steps
failure_modes.mitigation: Add stage-aware action suggestions in prompt/DealContext
failure_modes.rollback: Link to static playbooks as interim guidance

failure_modes.failure_mode: LLM reasoning not captured; audit trails incomplete
failure_modes.detection: No stored reasoning metadata; cannot explain tool choice
failure_modes.mitigation: Capture reasoning metadata in decision ledger (tools_considered, rationale)
failure_modes.rollback: Capture minimal rationale fields in audit_log

failure_modes.failure_mode: RAG outage or errors appear as empty results (false negatives)
failure_modes.detection: RAG service down but agent says 'no deals found'; error logs in search_deals
failure_modes.mitigation: Circuit breaker + explicit error surfaced to LLM; fallback to DB search
failure_modes.rollback: Disable search_deals tool and use direct DB lookup
failure_modes.source: Codex report FM-6 / Gemini contrarian risk #5

failure_modes.failure_mode: Multiple HITL tool calls in one response drop all but first
failure_modes.detection: LLM emits multiple HITL tool calls; only first executed; others ignored
failure_modes.mitigation: Queue all HITL tool calls or enforce single-tool-call policy
failure_modes.rollback: Reject multi-tool-call responses and request single action

failure_modes.failure_mode: Stale approvals never expire (zombie approvals)
failure_modes.detection: Approvals remain pending/claimed beyond TTL; no expiry job runs
failure_modes.mitigation: Add background expiry job and enforce TTL on resume
failure_modes.rollback: Manual cleanup script; disable long-lived approvals

failure_modes.failure_mode: Prompt injection causes policy bypass
failure_modes.detection: Adversarial prompt tests override tool usage or HITL rules
failure_modes.mitigation: Add prompt injection guardrails and evaluate with adversarial suite
failure_modes.rollback: Disable high-risk tools for untrusted inputs
failure_modes.source: Claude-Opus report contrarian risk #5 / Gemini contrarian risk #3

failure_modes.failure_mode: Malformed tool call JSON from model breaks parsing
failure_modes.detection: LLM outputs invalid tool call JSON; tool parser errors in logs
failure_modes.mitigation: Add robust tool call parser with repair or re-ask pattern
failure_modes.rollback: Fallback to non-tool response with explicit error

patch_set.change: Add create_deal (and any other write tools like add_note if required) to HITL_TOOLS and enforce in requires_approval logic
patch_set.where: Phase 0: Safety/HITL Enforcement section (HITL gating subsection)
patch_set.verification: Golden trace: create_deal request returns pending_approval; audit_log shows approval required

patch_set.change: Validate actor_id against authenticated service token/JWT claims; enforce tenant scoping; log mismatches
patch_set.verification: Adversarial test: fake actor_id returns 403; audit log records auth mismatch

patch_set.change: Add grounding enforcement: system prompt rule + graph guard that requires get_deal/search_deals before deal-specific answers
patch_set.verification: Grounding gate test: asking deal stage must trigger get_deal tool call before response

patch_set.change: Standardize ToolResult schema (success/data/error/metadata); remove plain-string error returns; add try/except wrapper
patch_set.verification: Unit tests confirm errors return ToolResult.success=false; no raw exceptions bubble

patch_set.change: Add idempotency_key to create_deal/add_note payloads; enforce in backend
patch_set.verification: Idempotency tests: double-call yields same record id; no duplicates

patch_set.change: Implement tool call budget and context/token budget in GraphState; stop after N calls
patch_set.verification: Loop test halts at max tool calls and returns controlled error

patch_set.change: Add correlation_id middleware and propagate to backend headers; configure Langfuse/OTel
patch_set.verification: Log query shows same correlation_id across UI->agent->backend; traces visible in Langfuse

patch_set.change: Add prompt versioning + hash; generate tool list dynamically to avoid drift
patch_set.verification: Prompt version logged per request; CI check ensures registry/tool list match

patch_set.change: Enable long-term memory; implement deal-scoped memory + DealContext object
patch_set.verification: Deal follow-up queries use stored context; memory retrieval scoped by deal_id

patch_set.change: Add RAG provenance/freshness metadata and fallback path when RAG down
patch_set.verification: RAG-down test returns explicit error and uses DB fallback; responses include provenance

patch_set.change: Create decision ledger for non-HITL actions; capture reasoning metadata
patch_set.verification: Every tool call inserts ledger row with trace_id and rationale

patch_set.change: Expand golden traces to >=30; add CI gate + adversarial suite (prompt injection, malformed tool calls, outages)
patch_set.verification: CI fails on any golden trace regression; adversarial suite executed

patch_set.change: Add stage transition rules and stage-aware recommendations to prompt + DealContext
patch_set.verification: Scenario tests show valid transitions only; next-step recommendations present

patch_set.change: Add deal health scoring and surface in responses
patch_set.verification: Health score computed for deals and included in DealContext

patch_set.change: Make mem0 provider configurable; support local embeddings; remove hard OpenAI dependency
patch_set.verification: Local-only deployment passes without OpenAI key; golden traces succeed

patch_set.change: Fix invalid dev mocks (stage enums) to align with production taxonomy
patch_set.verification: Dev mocks use valid stage enums; unit tests pass

tough_gates.gate: Gate A: Tool unit tests + ToolResult schema
requirements: All tools return ToolResult with success/data/error
Schema validation tests for each tool input
Error handling returns success=false (no raw exceptions)
tough_gates.evidence: Unit test logs + sample ToolResult payloads

requirements: Bypass attempts fail and are audited
tough_gates.evidence: Golden trace for create_deal returns pending_approval; audit_log shows approval required

requirements: Deal fact questions must call get_deal/search_deals
No answer if tool call fails
tough_gates.evidence: Scenario tests show tool call before answer; responses blocked on tool failure
DB queries show single record after double-call
Adversarial test logs; audit entry for mismatch

requirements: correlation_id present in UI, agent, backend logs
Langfuse/OTel traces visible for agent_turn + tool_execution
tough_gates.evidence: Trace sample with shared correlation_id across services

tough_gates.gate: Gate G: Eval regression gate in CI
requirements: adversarial suite for prompt injection, malformed tool calls, outages
tough_gates.evidence: CI logs show eval run; failures block merge

ship_criteria: All P0/P1 issues closed with verified evidence
Gates A-G pass in CI and staging
Idempotency tests show 0 duplicates across retries
Correlation ID present end-to-end in logs and traces
Langfuse/OTel traces available for 95%+ of requests
Adversarial suite passes (prompt injection, RAG outage, malformed tool calls)
